title: Aurelith
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/UCGLP4D.png)

Aurelith is a mod adding a new amethyst and gold themed resource. Mod adds 3 weapons and a few enchantments for them.


```
Aurelith Longsword - a new sword stronger than netherite that creates a explosion upon right clicking and 1 enchantment.
Aurelith Scythe - a new weapon type that creates fast projectiles upon right clicking.
Aurelith Trident - a new trident with auto-loyalty and 2 enchantments.
Aurelith Rod - a new tool type that clears all effects upon right clicking.
Aurelith Catalyst - When held in main hand and right clicked, item in offhand will be fixed for some amount of durability. 
Aurelith Projector - a new tool for getting effects mid-fight. (put a diamond in that slot btw)
Aurelith Armor Trim - a new trim only working with Aurelith Shard.
```


Mod inspired by Winsweep's Amarite.

Mod made with MCreator.
